violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. An application was given during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2024

The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Written procedures were given to the person in charge during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2024

Rice and beans were observed held at 87 degrees Fahrenheit in the oven. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, caterer delivered food about 15 minutes prior to inspection. Rice and beans were reheated to 165 during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/05/2023
